tournament.name: FIFA World Cup 2026
tournament.notes: Tournament shell for FIFA World Cup 2026.

groups.notes: Final draw groups, completed after the March 2026 play-offs.

schedule.notes: Official group-stage fixtures and venues. Kick-off times are not stored in Phase 1.

ranking.notes: Used as deterministic ranking seed for prediction tie-breakers.

regulations.notes: Used for official rules, tie-breakers and bracket seed data.

knockoutTemplate.sourceVersion: Regulations for the FIFA World Cup 26, March 2026, article 12.6-12.11
knockoutTemplate.notes: Official knockout-stage template from M73 to M104.

thirdPlaceCombinations.sourceVersion: Regulations for the FIFA World Cup 26, March 2026, article 12.6 and Annex C reference
thirdPlaceCombinations.notes: Contains all 495 possible sets of eight qualified third-placed groups. Assignments are generated deterministically from the official R32 third-place slot pools while Annex C is not available as machine-readable text in the checked PDF.
